automationPolicy.ownedAccounts: Use official publishing APIs or approved schedulers only.
automationPolicy.communities: Human review required before posting or replying.

channels.label: YouTube Shorts
channels.notes: Use videos.insert with localized title/description and publishAt when OAuth is configured.

channels.label: TikTok
channels.notes: Direct Post requires explicit account consent; unaudited clients are private-only and API caps must be respected.

channels.label: Instagram Reels
channels.notes: Use Instagram professional account publishing or Meta Business Suite; no browser posting automation.

channels.label: Facebook Reels
channels.notes: Cross-post only where the audience is distinct enough to avoid duplicate-fatigue.

channels.label: Bluesky
channels.notes: Post one text/link update per day with language tags and a campaign link.

channels.label: Mastodon
channels.notes: Use scheduled_at for owned posts; pick one relevant instance/account, not many duplicate accounts.

channels.label: X
channels.notes: Use official API/native scheduling only if account/API access exists.

channels.label: Reddit
channels.notes: Do not auto-post. Radar may draft a reply, but Jonathan manually checks rules and context.

channels.label: Hacker News
channels.notes: Only post founder/story content when it is genuinely interesting to HN.

channels.label: Product Hunt
channels.notes: Prepare one coordinated launch, not daily posting.

fr-FR.sleep: Une pluie douce, une forêt calme, un timer. Oasis transforme l'iPhone en refuge sonore, sans abonnement.
fr-FR.premium: Une app calme ne devrait pas te facturer tous les mois. Oasis se débloque avec un achat unique.
fr-FR.spatial: Mets un casque: avec Oasis, tu peux placer la pluie autour de toi.

en-US.sleep: Soft rain, a calm forest, a timer. Oasis turns your iPhone into a sound shelter, no subscription.
en-US.premium: A calm app should not bill you every month. Oasis unlocks with one purchase.
en-US.spatial: Put on headphones: with Oasis, you can place rain around you.

de-DE.sleep: Sanfter Regen, ein ruhiger Wald, ein Timer. Oasis macht dein iPhone zum Klangrückzugsort, ohne Abo.
de-DE.premium: Eine ruhige App sollte dich nicht jeden Monat belasten. Oasis wird mit einem einmaligen Kauf freigeschaltet.
de-DE.spatial: Setz Kopfhörer auf: Mit Oasis kannst du Regen um dich herum platzieren.

es-ES.sleep: Lluvia suave, bosque tranquilo y temporizador. Oasis convierte tu iPhone en un refugio sonoro, sin suscripción.
es-ES.premium: Una app de calma no debería cobrarte cada mes. Oasis se desbloquea con una compra única.
es-ES.spatial: Ponte auriculares: con Oasis puedes colocar la lluvia a tu alrededor.

it.sleep: Pioggia leggera, foresta calma e timer. Oasis trasforma l'iPhone in un rifugio sonoro, senza abbonamento.
it.premium: Un'app per rilassarsi non dovrebbe farti pagare ogni mese. Oasis si sblocca con un acquisto unico.
it.spatial: Metti le cuffie: con Oasis puoi posizionare la pioggia intorno a te.

pt-BR.sleep: Chuva suave, floresta calma e timer. Oasis transforma o iPhone em um refúgio sonoro, sem assinatura.
pt-BR.premium: Um app calmo não deveria cobrar todo mês. Oasis desbloqueia tudo com uma compra única.
pt-BR.spatial: Coloque fones: com Oasis, você posiciona a chuva ao seu redor.
